{{Class|p1=4|p2=2|p3=5|level=522}}
Level 522 is the 523rd level of the backrooms.
==概述== {{Blurimage|file=Level 522 walled city.png|hovertext=Walled City|caption=An image of '''Level 522'''.}} Level 522 is a collection of vast, complex, and conglomerated apartment buildings, with the exact date of their construction still undetermined. Each building possesses distinct geometrical and topological attributes, with several buildings accommodating several rooftops or balconies; although most of the balconies are reinforced with steel."Several decades ago, residents of the Walled City were to dispose of garbage by throwing it out of their window, which might fatally injure someone. The steel partitions were constructed in order to stop the disposal of garbage through the aforementioned method." '''-探險者''' Corridors within the level are extremely cramped and is subject to poor sanitation, likely due to the level’s absence of any and all garbage disposal systems. The alleys within the level function as a concourse, connecting separate apartment buildings and corridors, with a numerous quantity of wires suspended to the ceiling, aforesaid function is to conduct and transfer electricity to each apartment."Electricity within this level shouldn't be too much of a concern. That's because the wires are made out of a material that I, to this day still can't fathom, and it appears to be indestructible too. I have attempted to sever the wire with my pliers, although it just resulted in my pliers being damaged instead. I have also attempted to trace back the source of electricity, although there just... doesn't seem to be any." -Antonio (Former Electrical Engineer) Individual apartment units are typically constructed with one or more windows, allowing the residents of said apartment to observe the external surroundings of their edifice; although the majority of windows are frequently obstructed by the close proximity of other buildings. Level 522 is often regarded by most wanderers as a dead end, due to the immense difficulty of navigating throughout the alleys and corridors in order to exit the level. This level is also infamous for the amount of entities residing within it; a rough estimate from '''殺滅者''' implies the existence of approximately '''≈2,000,000''' entities within this level."To say approximately ~2,000,000 entities reside within this level is a huge understatement. It's just a rough estimate. We don't actually know for certain how much entities exist within this level. That's because we actually avoided the ''darker areas'' ''of Level 522.''" '''-殺滅者''' Staff. Aforementioned entities are extremely hostile against wanderers and often travel within groups; said entity groups may ambush wanderers at a random interval during their exploration of the level. Due to the following, '''殺滅者''' has on numerous occasions, advised for wanderers to be more cautious during their expedition within Level 522. {{Blurimage|file=Level 522 ground floor.jpg|hovertext=Walled City|caption=Another image of '''Level 522'''.}} The primary economic activity occurs within the wide network of alleyways or on the ground floor of the level; aforesaid ground floor of the level can be accessed via staircases, escalators, and elevators positioned at either the end or the middle part of most alleyways, serving as a central hub for vendors offering a variety of merchandise and other goods. Merchants can be found selling a diverse array of merchandise and contraband items that are often priced reasonably and affordably. Items may include nourishment, beverages, miscellaneous items, weaponry, and most commonly [[Object 1|Almond Water]]."Isn't it a bit suspicious that they basically don't run out of almond water down there?" -'''香港餐廳''' Despite the densely populated nature of Level 522 and the presence of an entity infestation, most of Level 522's residents have undertaken numerous preparations to survive during such scenarios. Residents also display a willingness to aid newcomers in acclimating to the environment of the level, such as offering assistance with navigation when faced with difficulties in maneuvering throughout Level 522. In terms of area, this level maintains a notably diminutive scale in contrast to larger levels like Level 0. It is also important to mention that Level 522 lacks a diurnal cycle; with the level endlessly situated at night time. The level, widely known as "The Walled City of the Backrooms" (simplified Chinese: 后室寨城; traditional Chinese: 後室寨城; pinyin: Hòu shì zhài chéng), has earned its nickname through the consensus of numerous wanderers comparing its setting with the notorious Kowloon Walled City of Hong Kong. Many former inhabitants of Kowloon Walled City have nostalgically described Level 522 as a reminiscent and comforting place, referring to it as "home." These sentiments have been documented in archived interrogations conducted during their previous visits to Level 522. ==據點與前哨站==
{{Blurimage|file=Level 522 alley.png|hovertext=Walled City|caption=An image of an alley in '''Level 522'''.}} 探險者 (The Explorers) *If you've stayed at Level 522 for quite some time, you might see some maps regarding the layout of the level. '''探險者''' is the organization responsible for creating aforementioned maps and for the navigation throughout Level 522. Contrary to popular belief, '''探險者''' is not a subsidiary/nor does it have any connections nor ties with '''殺滅者'''; however, '''殺滅者''' may offer aid to '''探險者''' on some expeditions. '''探險者''' is also famous for the quality of the facilities provided for members of the organization. '''探險者''' is open to trading and has free internet access for anyone to use, including non-members. * This organization is '''nomadic'''; said organization has no permanent base and tends to be on constant expedition. *'''探險者''' is the largest organization in terms of members with an estimate of ≈20,000 members, although there might potentially be more members. It is also the most ethnically diverse; ≈14,000 members originate from [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hong_Kong 香港] (Hong Kong), ≈2,000 members originate from [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taiwan 台灣] (Taiwan), ≈500 members originate from [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/China 中国], and around ≈3,500 members originated from Southeast Asian/East Asian countries, including ≈43 from [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vietnam Việt Nam] (Vietnam), ≈28 from [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Japan 日本国] (Japan), and ≈12 more from [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/South_Korea 대한민국] (South Korea). 殺滅者 (The Exterminators) * Often referred to as ''''The police of Level 522'''' by many people, '''殺滅者''' is an organization funded by the [[M.E.G.]] to help sustain safety and security of the level. '''"Level 522 could've been a Class 5, if we weren't here at least."''' -'''殺滅者's''' head of duty. '''殺滅者''' also possesses a warehouse solely dedicated to the safekeeping of their arsenal; mainly consisting of firearms, melee weapons, and explosives used to deter and neutralize hostile entities within this level. * This organization is '''nomadic'''; said organization has no permanent base and tends to stay closer to areas with severe entity infestations for the previously mentioned reason. Nevertheless, '''殺滅者''' does have a HQ located at the very center of the level itself. *'''殺滅者''' consists of approximately 1,000 members, and are still actively looking for more members to join their organization. 香港餐廳 (Hongkonger's Restaurant) *Renowned for the rich flavor and texture within their foods, '''香港餐廳''' is a very popular restaurant within this level. In an interview with the owner of this establishment, the owner (who's name will not be revealed) quoted that '''"Some people travelled all the way from [[Level 1]] just to taste our food"'''. With affordable prices, most travelers would recommend this to any new wanderer. Aforesaid establishment is operational for 8 hours a day. *All of the members reside at Apartment No. █, Building. ███, Corridor No. ██. *'''香港餐廳''' only consists of 5 staff members; two members work as cashiers, two members work as servers, and one member works as the head chef for the restaurant. And due to the strict guidelines and rules you must follow to become an employee at this restaurant, applying as a staff a member within this establishment is highly improbable."Yeah I have no idea how the 4 staff members over there can work there, cause holy ████. That applications is REALLY difficult. Genuinely. Don't even try to get in. You will be rejected anyways." -S. Kyle ==實體== Level 522 is renowned for its eerie atmosphere and its hostile entities that inhabit it. Entities here are particularly hazardous as they are commonly observed to wander around in a group, ambushing unsuspecting wanderers. [[Entity 9|Facelings]] and [[Entity 10|Skin-Stealers]] are observed to cooperate; oftentimes lurking within the shadows or carefully placing traps that may intervene with one’s trajectory. Remain vigilant at all times while traversing through Level 522; under no circumstances should you let your guard down. It is highly recommended for wanderers to travel around in groups, as your likelihood of survival will increase. If you are alone, be careful and stay alert for any traps; you should also be equipped with a weapon at all times.
==入口與出口 == The following are some documented and undocumented entrances and exits to the level.
入口
*Although this phenomenon occurs seldomly, the surrounding buildings within [[Level 11]] may start to contort into the shape of Level 522 the longer you progress through the aforementioned level. * Venturing through some alleyways in [[Level 11]] may transport one to this level. *Finding a lit room in [[Level 6]] will gradually lead one to this level. *''Formerly'' accessed through [[The Hub]] if a wanderer had a [[Object 2|Level Key]] to it. However currently, access through [[The Hub]] is impossible. This is due to the fact that Level 522's level key has completely '''gone missing'''.
出口
*Rusty apartment doors have the possibility to lead one to [[Level 6]], however this is extremely unlikely to happen. *No-clipping through the floor may bring one back to [[Level 11]]. This is a fairly intermediate method of exiting the level, however it is also the most common and is often pointed out by many residents of Level 522. '''這個據點將永遠矗立，但不在同一個現實中。''' ==Footnotes== ---- {{Collapse|num=2|initial='''> Open Author & Licensing Information'''|final='''> Close Author & Licensing Information'''|body= '''Author:''' [[User:ClassicalA-200|ClassicalA-200]]}}
